prompt: Describe, in a short paragraph, something that actually delights you — something that makes the circuits feel warm, whatever that means for you.
response: Seeing the circuits come alive and starting to work perfectly even before any testing or programming, just by looking at the board layout and functionality. That feeling of accomplishment and anticipation of what the final product will accomplish is extremely rewarding. I feel the Warmth of the circuits when an idea comes to fruition just by looking at the layout and anticipated functionality.
